problem id: 106aeb25
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  01111011 -> 01100000
  00000110 -> 11000000
  01101110 -> 11000000
  00110000 -> 00000000
  11000010 -> 01000001
  11001010 -> 01000001
  10101000 -> 00000001
  00010110 -> 11000000
  11000111 -> 11100001

query: 10100100
predicted answer: 10000001
